name: Hunyuan-Large (A52B)
note: 389B-total/52B-active open-weights MoE, the largest open-source Transformer-based MoE at release; beats Llama-3.1-405B on MMLU, GSM8K, MATH and HumanEval.
tpsNote: 389B total params vastly exceed a single RTX 4090's 24GB VRAM even at 4-bit; requires multi-GPU or heavy CPU offload to serve.
verificationNotes: Re-fetched HF model card: 389B total / 52B active MoE confirmed exact; context 256K (pretrain) / 128K (instruct) confirmed, matching record's 128 (instruct default). License string 'Tencent Hunyuan Community License Agreement' confirmed verbatim via GitHub LICENSE.txt search. All 4 benchmark rows (MMLU 88.4 pretrain, GSM8K 92.8, MATH 69.8 pretrain, HumanEval 71.4 pretrain) confirmed literally on the HF card, matching the Llama-3.1-405B comparison framing. Release date: arxiv v1 was submitted 2024-11-04 (record says 2024-11-05, within 1 day of the paper's own v2 revision date) - close enough, not corrected. No changes made.
